description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof, featuring a combination of large glass panels and wood-textured exterior walls. The front yard includes a driveway with two parked cars, a manicured lawn, and several palm trees and shrubs. The backyard boasts a spacious swimming pool, a poolside lounge area with sunbeds and a canopy, and a landscaped garden with decorative plants and a small fountain. Expansive floor-to-ceiling windows dominate the rear facade, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The house is surrounded by a low fence, and the overall design emphasizes clean lines and open, functional outdoor living areas. The architectural style is distinctly modern, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern two-story house with wood and glass exteriors, featuring a driveway, landscaped gardens, and a backyard pool with lounge area. Large windows and clean lines define its contemporary style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the driveway with two cars, wood-paneled facade, and a glimpse of the backyard garden and pool.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the large glass windows, landscaped backyard with a fountain, and the swimming pool with lounge area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wood exterior, side garden with palm trees, and the pool area extending outward.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the main entrance, two parked cars, and a simple, modern facade with multiple windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with glass panels, no porch, direct access from driveway, minimal decorative elements
